CC 2.1.162 / 2.1.163 backlog — verification verdicts

9 open "adopt CC feature" issues, one verification agent each. Hard-skeptic bar (code-only audits here ran ~60% false-positive). Result: 1 genuinely relevant, 8 not-applicable.

0
adopted
0
not-applicable
0
audited
Headline: #2224 (hook if:Bash subshell match) was pre-flagged as "live, needs code work" — verification proved otherwise. ork's two if:Bash gates are CC-side perf pre-filters; the real block/ask decision is re-parsed in TypeScript (dangerous-command-blocker.ts), independent of CC's matcher. The 2.1.163 fix is net-positive. No code change.
